name: 03_ger40_m15_donchian_trend_v1
hypothesis: On GER40 M15, a 20-bar Donchian breakout filtered by ADX>=22 and EMA50>EMA200 trend alignment captures sustained intraday-to-multiday trends, producing PF>=2.0 with acceptable drawdown.

regime_filter.description: Only take breakouts in the direction of the higher-period EMA alignment and only when ADX confirms trend strength.

signals.entry_long: Close > Donchian_Upper(20)[1] AND EMA(50) > EMA(200) AND ADX(14) >= 22
signals.entry_short: Close < Donchian_Lower(20)[1] AND EMA(50) < EMA(200) AND ADX(14) >= 22

exits.breakeven_trigger: Move SL to entry after +1.5*ATR favorable
